findings.message: New Prometheus scrape job 'redis' added with no corresponding alert rules. A redis_alerts.yml file is missing from infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/, following the pattern established by postgres_alerts.yml.
findings.suggestion: Create infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/redis_alerts.yml with appropriate alert rules (e.g., RedisDown alert checking up{job="redis"} == 0).

findings.message: New Prometheus scrape job 'redis' added with no corresponding Grafana dashboard. A redis.json file is missing from infra/observability/grafana/dashboards/, following the pattern established by postgres.json.
findings.suggestion: Create infra/observability/grafana/dashboards/redis.json with dashboard panels visualizing Redis metrics from the redis-exporter (e.g., memory usage, connected clients, operations/sec).
